Tonberry's Finest Night Venue

CLUBLUMOS

Where darkness becomes art.
Where night becomes legend.

Location
Tonberry | Empyreum Plot 42, Ward 8

✦ Next Event

ECLIPSE NOIR

A Night of Shadows & Sound

✦ About Us

A Universe
of Night

Club Lumos is not merely a venue — it is a sensory world unto itself. Born from a vision of luxury, darkness, and transcendence, we curate experiences that blur the line between reality and euphoria.

From hand-crafted cocktails to world-class resident DJs, every detail at Lumos is designed to immerse you in an atmosphere of refined exclusivity.

05+Years Active
50+Signature Cocktails
∞Unforgettable Nights
EST.2019

✦ What We Offer

Our Services

Tailored experiences for the discerning guest

◈

Premium Bar

Curated spirits, rare vintages, and bespoke cocktails crafted by master mixologists.

Full bar · Bottle service · Private selection
◉

VIP Tables

Exclusive sections with dedicated service, premium bottle packages, and priority entry.

VIP · Semi-private · Floor access
◬

Live DJs

World-class resident and international guest DJs spinning across genres from midnight to dawn.

House · Techno · Deep · Afro
◫

Private Events

Transform Lumos into your exclusive venue for corporate, birthday, or product launch events.

Buyout · Semi-private · Packages
◭

Luxury Lounge

A dedicated lounge for premium guests featuring rare cigars, premium shisha, and curated service.

Cigar · Shisha · Private area
◮

Bottle Service

Our concierge arranges arrival, seating, and a personalized bottle parade for your group.

Arrival · Parade · Premium bottles

✦ Behind the Decks

Resident DJs

RESIDENT

DJ ZENITH

Techno · House · Experimental

PlaysEvery Friday

Internationally acclaimed, Zenith has headlined clubs from Berlin to Tokyo. His sets are a relentless journey through sound architecture and emotional intensity.

✦ The Bar

Signature Drinks

Crafted for the extraordinary palate

Signature

Lumos Noir

Aged rum, activated charcoal, black currant, smoked rosemary

IDR 185k
Signature

Midnight Veil

Gin, elderflower, butterfly pea, citrus foam, edible silver

IDR 195k
Signature

Neon Haze

Vodka, blue curaçao, lime, tonic, UV reactive garnish

IDR 165k
Premium

Eclipse

Japanese whisky, black sugar, smoked ice, charred citrus

IDR 245k
Premium

Velvet Dusk

Mezcal, hibiscus, tamarind, black salt rim, dehydrated rose

IDR 215k
Reserve

The Void

Cognac, aged port, walnut bitters, gold leaf, house-smoked oak

IDR 325k

✦ The Atmosphere

Feel the
Energy

Step into a world where sound, light, and architecture converge. Club Lumos is designed from the ground up to create an immersive multi-sensory experience unlike anything else in the city.

◆State-of-the-art Funktion-One sound system
◆Custom architectural lighting design
◆1,200 m² premium floor space
◆Two distinct zones: Main Floor & Lounge
◆Outdoor terrace with panoramic city views
1,200m²of Pure Experience

✦ Entry Standards

Dress Code
& Rules

To preserve the atmosphere of exclusivity and respect that defines Club Lumos, we ask all guests to adhere to our standards.

Age Policy

—Minimum age: 21 years
—Valid government-issued ID required
—No exceptions to this policy

Dress Code

—Smart casual to formal attire
—No sportswear, sandals, or torn clothing
—Fashion-forward looks strongly encouraged

Entry Policy

—Management reserves right of entry
—Reservation holders receive priority
—No re-entry after 01:00 WIB

Conduct

—Respect all guests and staff
—No photography on the main floor
—All substance policies strictly enforced

Reserve
Your Table

Secure your spot at one of Jakarta's most exclusive venues. Our team will confirm within 24 hours.
